# Brane Index

## Project

- **FizzBuzz API** — a REST API that serves fizzbuzz over HTTP
- Stateless request/response pattern, JSON output
- Bun + TypeScript, no database, pure computation

## Sources

### Architecture

- [fizzbuzz-api.md](architecture/fizzbuzz-api.md) — core concept: REST endpoints, stateless request/response, JSON output

### Design

- [endpoint-patterns.md](design/endpoint-patterns.md) — URL structures: path params, query params, ranges, batches, pagination, content negotiation
- [response-shape.md](design/response-shape.md) — JSON envelope options: minimal, rich, batch; open questions on types and metadata
- [error-handling.md](design/error-handling.md) — input validation, error response shape, HTTP status codes
